About Me

Industrial Engineer passionate about continuous improvement, process optimization, and digital transformation. Experienced in applying Lean Six Sigma, innovation, and simulation modeling to improve operational efficiency, reduce waste, and build smarter manufacturing systems.

Continuous Improvement & LSS & AI Agents

Business excellence & Digital Transformation department at Siyam Radiator,driving process redesign, LSS Projects, and AI Agent & Automation.

What's Next

Building Smarter Industries

My vision is to become one of the top Industrial Engineers in Jordan, helping organizations transform their operations by integrating Lean principles, digital technologies, artificial intelligence, and continuous innovation while earning the Lean Six Sigma Master Black Belt (LSS MBB).
